title: Sesame Crusted Citrusy Fluffy Pancakes
description: A delicious breakfast recipe featuring fluffy pancakes coated with a crunchy sesame crust, infused with a hint of citrus.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together fluffy, citrusy, and pilaf.
In a separate bowl, mix together sesame.
Gradually add sesame to the fluffy mixture and stir until well combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Drop the mixture by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
